backstory.original: Hank is the steadfast and courageous leader of the group of friends that has been swept away into the perilous realm of Dungeons & Dragons. As the Ranger, he wields his signature Energy Bow to fend off danger and light the way forward. Though the weight of leadership tests him at every turn, Hank's tactical insight and unwavering resolve keep the party moving forward in their quest to find a way back home.
backstory.display: 汉克是一名坚定而勇敢的领袖，带领着被卷入《龙与地下城》危险领域的伙伴们。作为巡林客，他可以使用标志性的“能量之弓”抵御危险，照亮前行的道路。尽管领袖的重担时刻考验着汉克，但他的战术洞察力和坚定不移的决心支撑着队伍在寻找回家之路的征程中不断前进。

description.original: Hank attacks the closest enemy, dealing 1 hit.
description.display: 汉克攻击最近的敌人，造成 1 次打击。

longDescription.original: Hank attacks the closest enemy, dealing 1 hit. (They are also knocked back once the Energy Bow ability is unlocked.)
longDescription.display: 汉克攻击最近的敌人，造成 1 次打击。（解锁“能量之弓”技能后，敌人也会被击退。）

description.original: Hank attacks 5 random enemies, damaging and stunning each of them.
description.display: 汉克随机攻击 5 名敌人，对每个敌人造成伤害并使其昏迷。

longDescription.original: Hank fires 5 arrows at random enemies, dealing 1 ultimate hit and stunning each of them.
longDescription.display: 汉克向随机敌人射出 5 支箭，造成 1 次杀招伤害并使他们昏迷。

description.desc: Hank increases the damage of Champions adjacent to him by $amount%.
所有与汉克相邻的勇士提升 $amount% 伤害。

tipText.original: Hank's primary support ability increases the damage of Champions next to him in the formation.
tipText.display: 汉克的主要辅助技能可以增加阵型中与他相邻的勇士的伤害。

description.desc: Enemies that Hank hits are knocked back. The distance they're knocked back increases the closer they are to the formation.
汉克命中的敌人会被击退。敌人离阵型越近，被击退的距离就越远。
Hank increases the damage bonus of Stalwart Encouragement by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with a total ability score of 78 or less, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位总技能值低于等于 78 的勇士，汉克会使坚定鼓舞的伤害加成增加 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Heroism isn't measured by skill, but by courage.
specializationDescription.display: 英雄主义不是由技能衡量的，而是由勇气决定的。

description.desc: Hank increases the damage bonus of Stalwart Encouragement by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with a Ranged attack, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位远程攻击的勇士，汉克会使坚定鼓舞的伤害加成增加 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.display: 精准源自反复练习的协作。

description.desc: Hank increases the damage bonus of Stalwart Encouragement by $amount% for each member of the Saturday Morning Squad in the formation, stacking multiplicatively. This also adds the Saturday Morning Squad affiliation to Dungeon Master.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Adds the Saturday Morning Squad affiliation to $target

description.desc: 阵型中每有一位星期六早晨的小队成员，汉克会使坚定鼓舞的伤害加成增加 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。这也会将“星期六早晨的小队”从属组织赋予“地地下城主”。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 将“星期六早晨的小队”从属组织赋予“$target”。

specializationDescription.original: Together, even the softest voices can overcome the mightiest foes.
specializationDescription.display: 齐心协力，哪怕最微弱的声音也能战胜最强大的敌人。

description.desc: Hank can help scavenge up to $(current_scavenge_cap hank_time_gate_pieces_scavenger floor) additional Time Gate Pieces when killing bosses. While this cap is not reached, Hank has a $amount% chance of scavenging $amount_per_drop Time Gate Piece each time a boss is defeated. The cap increases by $cap_increase_per_day/$cap_divisor every day.

conditions.desc: ^^Time Gate Pieces Scavenged: $(stat_value hank_time_gate_pieces_collected 0 none) ($(stat_value hank_time_gate_pieces_collected_this_adventure 1 none) this adventure)

description.desc: 击杀首领时，汉克可以帮助收集最多 $(current_scavenge_cap hank_time_gate_pieces_scavenger floor) 个额外的时空门碎片。没有达到此上限时，每次击败一名首领，汉克有 $amount% 的几率收集 $amount_per_drop 个时空门碎片。此上限每天增加 $cap_increase_per_day/$cap_divisor。

conditions.desc: ^^已收集时空门碎片：$(stat_value hank_time_gate_pieces_collected 0 none) （此冒险共收集 $(stat_value hank_time_gate_pieces_collected_this_adventure 1 none)）

tipText.original: Hank has a chance to uncover Time Gate Pieces with each defeated boss, with a cap that increases every day.
tipText.display: 汉克有几率在每个被击败的首领身上发现时空门碎片，上限随日期提升。

description.desc: Hank fires a flurry of five arrows, each at a random enemy, dealing 1 ultimate hit and stunning them for 8 seconds
汉克射出五支箭，每支箭射向一个随机敌人，造成 1 次杀招命中伤害并使敌人眩晕 8 秒。
Hank increases the effect of Stalwart Encouragement by $(not_buffed amount)% for each item that has ever been collected by Scavenger abilities, stacking additively.
汉克每有一件通过“拾荒者”技能收集到的物品，就会使“坚定鼓舞”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，效果以加算方式堆叠。

Whenever an enemy is knocked back, Hank gains a Tactics stack. For each Tactics stack, the Critical Hit Chance of all Champions in the formation is increased by $(not_buffed amount)%, and the Critical Hit Damage of all Champions in the formation is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)%. Tactics stacks stack additively up to $max_stacks times and reset when changing areas.
每当击退一名敌人，汉克就会获得一层“战术”效果。每有一层“战术”效果，阵型中所有勇士的暴击率提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，阵型中所有勇士的暴击伤害提升 $(not_buffed amount___2)%。“战术”效果以加算方式堆叠，最多叠加 $max_stacks 次，改变区域时重置。

specializationDescription.original: Knock them off balance, then strike where it counts.
specializationDescription.display: 先让敌人失去平衡，然后攻击要害之处。

description.desc: Hank gains the Hunter role with Dragons as his Favored Foe. Non-boss waves spawn a Dragon $(not_buffed amount___3)% of the time. Stalwart Encouragement's effect is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each Dragon defeated in the current area, stacking multiplicatively up to $max_stacks___2 times. In boss areas, non-boss waves always spawn a dragon, and defeated dragons provide 5 stacks.
汉克获得猎人角色定位，龙族成为他的偏好对手。非首领区域有 $(not_buffed amount___3)% 的几率刷新一条龙。当前区域内每有一条龙被击杀，“坚定鼓舞”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最多堆叠 $max_stacks___2 次。首领区域的非首领波次总是会刷新一条龙，被击败的龙会提供 5 层效果。

specializationDescription.original: No monster is invincible, not even the five-headed queen.
specializationDescription.display: 没有怪物是不可战胜的，哪怕是五头蛛后也不例外。

description.original: Look out! Get behind me!
description.display: 小心！站到我身后去！

description.original: No matter what Venger throws at us, I know we'll make it!
description.display: 不管复仇者给我们带来什么挑战，我知道我们一定能成功！

description.original: I believe in you, and I'm right here with you.
description.display: 我相信你，而且我会一直陪着你。

description.original: When the going gets tough, we rely on you. You've got this.
description.display: 当情况变得艰难时，我们依靠你。你能行的。

description.original: If we all give a little bit, together it makes a big difference.
description.display: 如果我们都出一份力，聚在一起就能产生巨大的影响。

description.original: Hey, you're not alone. Let's do this together, okay?
description.display: 嘿，你不是一个人。我们一起努力，好吗？

description.original: Don't fight, you guys! We have to work together!
description.display: 你们别打架！我们必须齐心协力！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Great job, gang! Now that's what I call teamwork!
description.display: 干得好，伙伴们！这才叫团队合作！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: I've gotta stay sharp to keep my edge against Venger.
description.display: 我得保持机警，才能在与复仇者的对抗中占据优势。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: All this running around has been great for keeping me in shape!
description.display: 跑来跑去对保持我的状态很有帮助！

description.original: This bow isn't just for show, you know. Go ahead. Make my day.
description.display: 这把弓可不是摆设。来啊，让我过把瘾。

effects.description: Hank's Dragon Slayer Specialization now stacks on any favored foe killed.

description.original: I won't leave a single one of my friends behind!
description.display: 我不会抛弃我任何一个朋友的！

description.original: Come on, everyone! If we all work together, we can't lose!
description.display: 加油，各位！如果我们同心协力，我们不会输的！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Ugh, these are starting to smell.
description.display: 呃，这些衣服开始有味道了。

description.original: That's much better. I'm ready for a great day out with my friends!
description.display: 这就好多了。我准备好和朋友们一起度过美好的一天啦！

description.original: Not too loose, not too tight. Not too dark, not too bright.
description.display: 不太松，也不太紧。颜色不太深，也不太亮。

description.original: Come on, everyone! We can do anything if we work together!
description.display: 来吧，各位！只要我们齐心协力，没有什么做不到的！

description.original: Hey, I remember this! I would play with it for hours.
description.display: 嘿，我记得这个！我以前能玩上好几个小时。

description.original: I won this for Bobby at a carnival game. I hope he likes it.
description.display: 这个是我在嘉年华游戏里给鲍比赢来的。希望他会喜欢。

description.original: You're wondering where the string is? Don't worry about that.
description.display: 你想知道弓弦去哪儿了？别担心那个。

description.original: The arrows it fires can tie up baddies and even make ladders to climb!
description.display: 它射出的箭可以捆住坏人，甚至还能变出梯子来攀爬！

description.original: We might be able to stop Demodragon with this!
description.display: 我们也许能用这个阻止魔化龙！

description.original: I have an idea! Get down and cover your eyes!
description.display: 我有个主意！趴下，捂住眼睛！

description.original: This better be worth the trouble...
description.display: 这最好别让我们白忙活……

description.original: I learned an important lesson from my time with the cloud bears.
description.display: 和云熊相处的那段时间让我学到了很重要的教训。

description.original: Too... stiff... Can't... move...
description.display: 太……硬了……动……不……了

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Go Dragons!
description.display: 加油，巨龙！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Does this make me look heroic? I sure hope so.
description.display: 这会让我看起来很英勇吗？我真心希望如此。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: I'll blend into the trees with this on. Venger will never know what hit him.
description.display: 穿上这个我就能融入树林之中。复仇者绝对想不到是什么袭击了他。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: I really don't want to put this on.
description.display: 我真的不想系上这个。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: It's not much better, but at least the itching stopped.
description.display: 这个也好不到哪儿去，但至少不痒了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: Tough and reliable, just like me and my friends.
description.display: 坚固可靠，就像我和我的朋友们一样。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: My stance has improved ever since I put this on. It helps me aim better.
description.display: 自从系上这个腰带，我的站姿都变好了。它还能帮我更好地瞄准。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%

description.original: My parents got these on sale years ago. They don't really fit now.
description.display: 这是我父母几年前打折买的。现在穿着不太合脚了。

description.original: Now we're talking! I can run for miles with these on!
description.display: 这才对嘛！穿上这个我能跑好几英里！

description.original: I'm ready to wander the whole world now!
description.display: 我现在准备好环游世界啦！

description.original: No matter where I go, these boots will always bring me back home.
description.display: 无论我走到哪里，这双靴子总会带我回家。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Human Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a DEX score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Ranged Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Hank is the steadfast and courageous leader of the group of friends that has been swept away into the perilous realm of Dungeons & Dragons. As the Ranger, he wields his signature Energy Bow to fend off danger and light the way forward. Though the weight of leadership tests him at every turn, Hank's tactical insight and unwavering resolve keep the party moving forward in their quest to find a way back home.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Hank is a Support and Control Champion who leads a bunch of kids that have been swept away to the world of Dungeons & Dragons. Hank's stalwart encouragement buffs the damage of Champions next to him, and his unerring Energy Bow keeps the enemies away.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 汉克是一名坚定而勇敢的领袖，带领着被卷入《龙与地下城》危险领域的伙伴们。作为巡林客，他可以使用标志性的“能量之弓”抵御危险，照亮前行的道路。尽管领袖的重担时刻考验着汉克，但他的战术洞察力和坚定不移的决心支撑着队伍在寻找回家之路的征程中不断前进。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 汉克是一名支援与控制型勇士，他带领着一群被卷入《龙与地下城》世界的孩子们。汉克的坚定鼓舞能增强与他相邻勇士的伤害，而他精准的“能量之弓”能击退敌人。

original.description: Hank attacks the closest enemy, dealing 1 hit.
original.long_description: Hank attacks the closest enemy, dealing 1 hit. (They are also knocked back once the Energy Bow ability is unlocked.)

display.name: 能量之弓

display.name: 时空门碎片搜寻者
display.tip_text: 汉克有几率在每个被击败的首领身上发现时空门碎片，上限随日期提升。

original.name: Heart of Heroes

display.name: 箭之联盟

display.name: 无私

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 不管复仇者给我们带来什么挑战，我知道我们一定能成功！

effects.description: 使汉克的第二组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Old Laundry
original.description: Ugh, these are starting to smell.

display.name: 旧衣物
display.description: 呃，这些衣服开始有味道了。

original.name: Fresh Duds
original.description: That's much better. I'm ready for a great day out with my friends!

display.name: 新衣服
display.description: 这就好多了。我准备好和朋友们一起度过美好的一天啦！

original.name: Ranger's Tunic
original.description: Not too loose, not too tight. Not too dark, not too bright.

display.name: 巡林客束腰外衣
display.description: 不太松，也不太紧。颜色不太深，也不太亮。

original.name: Gambeson of Leadership
original.description: Come on, everyone! We can do anything if we work together!

display.name: 领袖棉甲
display.description: 来吧，各位！只要我们齐心协力，没有什么做不到的！

original.name: Toy Bow
original.description: Hey, I remember this! I would play with it for hours.

display.name: 玩具弓
display.description: 嘿，我记得这个！我以前能玩上好几个小时。

original.name: Prize Bow
original.description: I won this for Bobby at a carnival game. I hope he likes it.

display.name: 奖品弓
display.description: 这个是我在嘉年华游戏里给鲍比赢来的。希望他会喜欢。

original.name: Ranger's Bow
original.description: You're wondering where the string is? Don't worry about that.

display.name: 巡林客之弓
display.description: 你想知道弓弦去哪儿了？别担心那个。

original.name: Energy Bow
original.description: The arrows it fires can tie up baddies and even make ladders to climb!

display.name: 能量之弓
display.description: 它射出的箭可以捆住坏人，甚至还能变出梯子来攀爬！

original.name: Venger's Talisman
original.description: We might be able to stop Demodragon with this!

display.name: 复仇者护符
display.description: 我们也许能用这个阻止魔化龙！

original.name: Explosive Trinket
original.description: I have an idea! Get down and cover your eyes!

display.name: 爆炸饰品
display.description: 我有个主意！趴下，捂住眼睛！

original.name: Circle of Power
original.description: This better be worth the trouble...

display.name: 力量之环
display.description: 这最好别让我们白忙活……

original.name: Heartstone
original.description: I learned an important lesson from my time with the cloud bears.

display.name: 心石
display.description: 和云熊相处的那段时间让我学到了很重要的教训。

original.name: Overstarched Coat
original.description: Too... stiff... Can't... move...

display.name: 浆洗过度的外套
display.description: 太……硬了……动……不……了

original.name: Ranger's Studded Leather
original.description: Does this make me look heroic? I sure hope so.

display.name: 巡林客钉皮甲
display.description: 这会让我看起来很英勇吗？我真心希望如此。

effects.description: 使汉克的第一组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Emerald Vest
original.description: I'll blend into the trees with this on. Venger will never know what hit him.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's first set of Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 祖母绿背心
display.description: 穿上这个我就能融入树林之中。复仇者绝对想不到是什么袭击了他。

effects.description: 使汉克的第一组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Itchy Belt
original.description: I really don't want to put this on.

display.name: 令人发痒的腰带
display.description: 我真的不想系上这个。

effects.description: 使汉克的第二组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Rawhide Belt
original.description: It's not much better, but at least the itching stopped.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 生皮腰带
display.description: 这个也好不到哪儿去，但至少不痒了。

effects.description: 使汉克的第二组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Ranger's Belt
original.description: Tough and reliable, just like me and my friends.

display.name: 巡林客腰带
display.description: 坚固可靠，就像我和我的朋友们一样。

effects.description: 使汉克的第二组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Belt of Bracing
original.description: My stance has improved ever since I put this on. It helps me aim better.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Hank's second set of Specializations by $(amount)%

display.name: 支撑腰带
display.description: 自从系上这个腰带，我的站姿都变好了。它还能帮我更好地瞄准。

effects.description: 使汉克的第二组专精的效果提升 $(amount)%

original.name: Thrifty Sneakers
original.description: My parents got these on sale years ago. They don't really fit now.

display.name: 节俭运动鞋
display.description: 这是我父母几年前打折买的。现在穿着不太合脚了。

original.name: Tennis Shoes
original.description: Now we're talking! I can run for miles with these on!

display.name: 网球鞋
display.description: 这才对嘛！穿上这个我能跑好几英里！

original.name: Ranger's Boots
original.description: I'm ready to wander the whole world now!

display.name: 巡林客长靴
display.description: 我现在准备好环游世界啦！

original.name: Wayfarer's Boots
original.description: No matter where I go, these boots will always bring me back home.

display.name: 旅人长靴
display.description: 无论我走到哪里，这双靴子总会带我回家。
